Class AbstractLobTypeHandler

java.lang.Object
com.ibatis.sqlmap.engine.type.BaseTypeHandler
org.springframework.orm.ibatis.support.AbstractLobTypeHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.ibatis.sqlmap.engine.type.TypeHandler
Direct Known Subclasses:
BlobByteArrayTypeHandler, BlobSerializableTypeHandler, ClobStringTypeHandler
@Deprecated public abstract class AbstractLobTypeHandler extends com.ibatis.sqlmap.engine.type.BaseTypeHandler
Deprecated.
as of Spring 3.2, in favor of the native Spring support in the Mybatis follow-up project (https://mybatis.org/)
Abstract base class for iBATIS TypeHandler implementations that map to LOBs. Retrieves the LobHandler to use from SqlMapClientFactoryBean at config time.

For writing LOBs, an active Spring transaction synchronization is required, to be able to register a synchronization that closes the LobCreator.

Offers template methods for setting parameters and getting result values, passing in the LobHandler or LobCreator to use.

Since:
1.1.5
Author:
Juergen Hoeller
See Also:
  • LobHandler
  • LobCreator
  • SqlMapClientFactoryBean.setLobHandler(LobHandler)

    Description
    Object
    getResult(CallableStatement cs, int columnIndex)
    Deprecated.
    This implementation always throws a SQLException: retrieving LOBs from a CallableStatement is not supported.

    Deprecated.
    This implementation delegates to getResultInternal, passing in the LobHandler of this type.

    This implementation delegates to the getResult version that takes a column index.

  • Field Details

    • LOB_CREATOR_SYNCHRONIZATION_ORDER

      public static final int LOB_CREATOR_SYNCHRONIZATION_ORDER
      Deprecated.
      Order value for TransactionSynchronization objects that clean up LobCreators. Return DataSourceUtils.CONNECTION_SYNCHRONIZATION_ORDER - 200 to execute LobCreator cleanup before JDBC Connection cleanup, if any.
      See Also:
      • DataSourceUtils.CONNECTION_SYNCHRONIZATION_ORDER
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractLobTypeHandler

      public AbstractLobTypeHandler()
      Deprecated.
      Constructor used by iBATIS: fetches config-time LobHandler from SqlMapClientFactoryBean.
      See Also:
      • SqlMapClientFactoryBean.getConfigTimeLobHandler()

    • AbstractLobTypeHandler

      protected AbstractLobTypeHandler(org.springframework.jdbc.support.lob.LobHandler lobHandler)
      Deprecated.
      Constructor used for testing: takes an explicit LobHandler.
      Parameters:
      lobHandler - the LobHandler to use

  • Method Details

    • setParameter

      public final void setParameter(PreparedStatement ps, int i, Object parameter, String jdbcType) throws SQLException
      Deprecated.
      This implementation delegates to setParameterInternal, passing in a transaction-synchronized LobCreator for the LobHandler of this type.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      See Also:
      • setParameterInternal(PreparedStatement, int, Object, String, LobCreator)

    • getResult

      Throws:
      SQLException

    • getResult

      public final Object getResult(ResultSet rs, int columnIndex) throws SQLException

      Throws:
      SQLException
      See Also:

    • getResult

      public Object getResult(CallableStatement cs, int columnIndex) throws SQLException
      Deprecated.
      This implementation always throws a SQLException: retrieving LOBs from a CallableStatement is not supported.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • setParameterInternal

      protected abstract void setParameterInternal(PreparedStatement ps, int index, Object value, String jdbcType, org.springframework.jdbc.support.lob.LobCreator lobCreator) throws SQLException, IOException
      Deprecated.
      Template method to set the given value on the given statement.
      Parameters:
      ps - the PreparedStatement to set on
      index - the statement parameter index
      value - the parameter value to set
      jdbcType - the JDBC type of the parameter (as supplied by iBATIS)
      lobCreator - the LobCreator to use
      Throws:
      SQLException - if thrown by JDBC methods
      IOException - if thrown by streaming methods

    • resolveJdbcType

      protected String resolveJdbcType(String jdbcType)
      Deprecated.
      Resolve the JDBC type name as passed in to setParameterInternal(PreparedStatement, int, Object, String, LobCreator).

      Subclasses may use this method to normalize or validate the provided JDBC type before applying it to the underlying PreparedStatement.

      Parameters:
      jdbcType - the JDBC type of the parameter, as provided by iBATIS
      Returns:
      the resolved JDBC type (never null, empty if no type specified)

    • getResultInternal

      protected abstract Object getResultInternal(ResultSet rs, int index, org.springframework.jdbc.support.lob.LobHandler lobHandler) throws SQLException, IOException
      Deprecated.
      Template method to extract a value from the given result set.
      Parameters:
      rs - the ResultSet to extract from
      index - the index in the ResultSet
      lobHandler - the LobHandler to use
      Returns:
      the extracted value
      Throws:
      SQLException - if thrown by JDBC methods
      IOException - if thrown by streaming methods
